extract: Deertrack Path (Japanese: シシの山道 Deer Mountain Path) is an area located in the northern region of the Obsidian Fieldlands of Hisui. It comprises the northwest section of the central island of the fieldlands, branching into Windswept Run to the southwest and Deertrack Heights to the southeast. It is directly across the bridge from Aspiration Hill, and can only be accessed after the player reaches First Star Rank.
